title: Review an OAuth/OIDC callback flow
description: Verify state, PKCE, redirect-uri allowlisting, and token handling on the callback before trusting the session.
body: Steps: 1. Confirm the authorization request includes and later verifies a state value (CSRF) and PKCE for public clients. 2. Check redirect_uri is matched against an exact allowlist. 3. Verify the code-for-token exchange happens server-side and the id_token is validated (signature/iss/aud/nonce). 4. Confirm the session is established only after validation. Rollback point: before changing redirect handling. Validation: tampered state, open-redirect attempt, and replayed code are all rejected.
